body: "Details of the application  The Environment Agency has received a new bespoke application for an environmental permit under the Environmental Permitting (England and Wales) Regulations 2016 from Matthew Wardell, Ian Geering, Samuel Mendes and Stephen Prendergast.  Application number  EPR/UB3440KR/A001  Regulated facility type  BS12566 Package treatment plant and a non-BS6297 infiltration system  Regulated facility address   Sheldon HouseThe IslandSteepHampshireGU32 1AE   National grid reference discharge point  SU 73636 25806  Receiving environment  Groundwater via a concrete ring chamber  Effluent type  Secondary treated sewage effluent  Volume  3.3 cubic metres per day  How to view the application  Please contact us via e-mail at psc-waterquality@environment-agency.gov.uk or contact us on 03708 506 506 to arrange to see the application documents.  How to comment on the application  If you have any comments on the application send these by 7 March 2025. You can comment:  Via email: psc-waterquality@environment-agency.gov.uk  For advice about how to make a representation or if you are unable to make a representation via e-mail please call 03708 506 506.  The Environment Agency will normally put any comments it receives on the public register. This includes your name but not your personal contact details. Please tell us if you do not want your response to be public.  The privacy notice for permit applicants/operators can be viewed at https://www.gov.uk/guidance/environmental-permits-privacy-notice "
